rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations, e.g., `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in type scope contracts
generic_rules: Trace unresolved identifiers to root causes before adding architecture
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for helper declarations and `const` for constants
Use `assign` for output assignments in implementation scope
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
